candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line appears below gross profit within operating expenses, not within or beneath the selected COGS row 'Cost of Revenues/COGS', which matches raw materials only. This looks like operating overhead D&A rather than COGS-specific D&A.

candidates.row_label: Deprecation amortisation and impairment charges - Balancing value
candidates.why: Component of the operating D&A line, but not specifically tied to COGS and appears to roll into the summary D&A row.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Component of the operating D&A line, but not specifically tied to COGS and appears to roll into the summary D&A row.

variables.notes: No separate COGS-related D&A row is visible. The selected COGS bucket is an explicit cost-of-revenues line equal to raw materials, while the visible D&A is presented separately in operating expenses and is better treated with SG&A/overhead, not added to COGS.

candidates.why: Separate same-level operating expense line alongside the selected SG&A component rows ('Other External Costs', 'Personnel costs', 'Selling Expenses', 'Administrative Exp.'). It appears outside those selected rows, so it should be added separately later if SG&A is being constructed from components. Prefer this summary row over its components to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Deprecation amortisation and impairment charges - Balancing value
candidates.why: Looks like a component of the summary D&A row; do not use if the summary row is selected.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Looks like another component of the summary D&A row; do not use if the summary row is selected.

variables.notes: The visible D&A line is a separate operating-expense row and does not appear embedded in the selected SG&A component rows. Summary row chosen instead of components. No separate R&D row is visible and XRD is empty, so no R&D-specific exclusion applies.
